title: New Utopia
description: New Utopia tries to give the Player a better Game experience with many new Additions to make the overall Gameplay more enjoyable including new Mobs & Bosses, overhauled Dimensions and a variety of magical and tecnical Improvements.
body:
# **New Utopia**

### **FEATURES**

- 200+ Mods
- Fully Optimized with Shader Support
- Overhauled Overworld / Nether / End  [Oh the Biomes We've Gone, Better Nether, Better End]
- Lots of new Dungeons & Structures
- New Bosses and Mobs
- Improved Modes of Transport [Small Ships, Immersive Aircraft]
- Xaero's Minimap & Worldmap
- Many Quality of Live Improvements
